reason: Browser-use feature successfully executed browser navigation task and returned correct page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully, showing Gamut interface with agent list in sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260604-152826-1bcf" agent in the sidebar - Agent chat interface opened with message input field ready
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into input field - Message entered successfully in active textbox
Clicked Send button to submit message - Message sent successfully to agent
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response - Agent completed task in 11 seconds

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot - Response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." Agent successfully opened browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title, and closed the browser. Live browser preview showed the correct page during execution.
